Operation 'createWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, not_actionable. Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Improved version clarifies the webhook's purpose (event notifications), specifies required inputs (URL and event types), explains the return value (webhook object with ID), and indicates the side effect (immediate activation). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Register a new webhook for event notifications
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook endpoint to receive real-time event notifications from EmailLabs. Requires specifying the target URL and the event types to subscribe to (e.g., delivery, bounce, open, click). Returns the created webhook object with a unique webhook_id for future reference and management. The webhook will begin receiving events immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Improved version clarifies the webhook's purpose (event notifications), specifies required inputs (URL and event types), explains the return value (webhook object with ID), and indicates the side effect (immediate activation). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original description lacks specificity and actionable details. Improved version clarifies the required parameter (webhook_id), explains the side effects (stops notifications, endpoint deactivation), indicates the return value (success confirmation), and notes that the webhook_id becomes invalid. This enables AI agents to understand the consequences of deletion and when this operation is appropriate.

data.summary_suggestion: Remove a webhook endpoint from service
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing webhook identified by webhook_id, immediately stopping all event notifications to that endpoint. Requires the webhook_id parameter. Returns a success confirmation. After deletion, the webhook will no longer receive any events from EmailLabs, and the webhook_id cannot be reused.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity and actionable details. Improved version clarifies the required parameter (webhook_id), explains the side effects (stops notifications, endpoint deactivation), indicates the return value (success confirmation), and notes that the webhook_id becomes invalid. This enables AI agents to understand the consequences of deletion and when this operation is appropriate.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a specified email address from the blacklist, allowing it to receive emails again. Requires the email address as a path parameter. message: Operation 'sendEmail' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Send a transactional email message through EmailLabs
data.description_suggestion: Sends a transactional email message through the EmailLabs platform. Accepts email details including recipient, subject, body, and optional template reference via SendEmailRequest. Returns SendEmailResponse containing the message ID and delivery status. The email is queued for immediate delivery and tracked for events (opens, clicks, bounces).
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about inputs (SendEmailRequest structure), outputs (SendEmailResponse contents), and side effects (email queuing and event tracking). Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of what data to provide, what to expect in response, and what happens after the operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Register a new webhook for event notifications
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook endpoint to receive real-time event notifications from EmailLabs. Requires specifying the target URL and the event types to subscribe to (e.g., delivery, bounce, open, click). Returns the created webhook object with a unique webhook_id for future reference and management. The webhook will begin receiving events immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Improved version clarifies the webhook's purpose (event notifications), specifies required inputs (URL and event types), explains the return value (webhook object with ID), and indicates the side effect (immediate activation). message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original description lacks specificity and actionable details. Improved version clarifies the required parameter (webhook_id), explains the side effects (stops notifications, endpoint deactivation), indicates the return value (success confirmation), and notes that the webhook_id becomes invalid. This enables AI agents to understand the consequences of deletion and when this operation is appropriate.

data.summary_suggestion: Remove a webhook endpoint from service
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing webhook identified by webhook_id, immediately stopping all event notifications to that endpoint. Requires the webhook_id parameter. Returns a success confirmation. After deletion, the webhook will no longer receive any events from EmailLabs, and the webhook_id cannot be reused.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity and actionable details. Improved version clarifies the required parameter (webhook_id), explains the side effects (stops notifications, endpoint deactivation), indicates the return value (success confirmation), and notes that the webhook_id becomes invalid. This enables AI agents to understand the consequences of deletion and when this operation is appropriate.
